programme.title: Absurdy drogowe
programme.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski travel around Poland in search of unusual road situations.

programme.title: Absurdy drogowe
programme.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski travel around Poland in search of unusual road situations.

programme.title: Steel Buddies 5
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: Three eccentric mechanics, Jimmy de Ville, Ant Partridge and Helen Stanley, decide to reactivate the once great British engineering company, Goblin.Together they restore the most famous cars and motorcycles in the world.The designs they create are characterized not only by a unique appearance, but also by above-average performance and attention to every detail.This season, the trio faces the difficult challenge of starting and promoting their new business.Their goal is to attract new customers and create unique machines.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: Three eccentric mechanics, Jimmy de Ville, Ant Partridge and Helen Stanley, decide to reactivate the once great British engineering company, Goblin.Together they restore the most famous cars and motorcycles in the world.The designs they create are characterized not only by a unique appearance, but also by above-average performance and attention to every detail.This season, the trio faces the difficult challenge of starting and promoting their new business.Their goal is to attract new customers and create unique machines.

programme.title: Megatransporty
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the work of Polish drivers who transport oversized loads on a daily basis.They have to endure not only long separation from their families, but also unusual equipment and dangerous routes.

programme.title: HMS Ark Royal
programme.desc: The creators of the series look at the ship HMS Ark Royal, which is taking part in a special mission.For 5 months he will lead an international group during naval maneuvers in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Extreme Car Hoarders 2
programme.desc: Former wrestler Chuck Palumbo and hot rod guru Rick Dore founded the 'SLAM' body shop.They travel around the USA in search of classic cars.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy made his fortune scrapping cars.He is assisted by his father Bobby and a team of eccentric associates.They renovate machines that previous owners threw into the trash.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy made his fortune scrapping cars.He is assisted by his father Bobby and a team of eccentric associates.They renovate machines that previous owners threw into the trash.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 16
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and mechanic Ant Anstead struggle to restore damaged vehicles.They want to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.When the car goes to the workshop, Edd restores its shine.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 16
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and mechanic Ant Anstead struggle to restore damaged vehicles.They want to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.When the car goes to the workshop, Edd restores its shine.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: 112: Feuerwehr im Einsatz
programme.desc: Firefighters from the German Ruhr area appear wherever help is needed.They are often the first on the scene not only of a fire, but also of a car accident.They must show courage.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 14
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Będzie pan zadowolony 2
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit workshops with a hidden camera to observe the work of mechanics.The leader will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: Będzie pan zadowolony 2
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit workshops with a hidden camera to observe the work of mechanics.The leader will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 2
programme.desc: In each episode, Mike and Edd struggle with restoring a damaged car.Their goal is to sell the renovated car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 2
programme.desc: In each episode, Mike and Edd struggle with restoring a damaged car.Their goal is to sell the renovated car at a profit.

programme.title: Misfit Garage
programme.desc: Former employees of Richard Rawlings open their own workshop.First, they need to develop a good reputation to attract customers and be able to become a real replacement for their former employer.

programme.title: Absurdy drogowe
programme.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski travel around Poland in search of unusual road situations.
